programme.desc: San Quentin's warden says that other than an inmate's release date, visits are the most important things in their lives; for some, visits are rare moments of intimacy; for others, they are business transaction opportunities.

programme.title: Lockup: Wabash: Extended Stay

programme.desc: Indiana's Wabash Valley Correctional Facility is an isolated fortress with three officers for every 200 inmates; some inmates find themselves in racial conflict, while others seek conflict elsewhere.

programme.title: Lockup: Wabash: Extended Stay
programme.desc: The vast majority of inmates live in two-man cells but even with careful screening, conflicts can still arise between cell mates; one inmate covers up his own beating, and plucked from death row, another inmate tries to make a difference.

programme.title: Lockup: Wabash: Extended Stay
programme.desc: With over 2,000 inmates, the Wabash Valley Correctional Facility has a larger population and more acreage than the small town in which it's located; after a decade in confinement, one of Indiana's most infamous inmates moves to general population.

programme.title: Lockup: Wabash: Extended Stay
programme.desc: The killer of a corrections officer fights to be freed from 16 years of solitary confinement, and boyhood friends struggle to parent their kids from behind prison walls; but one, cut-off from visits with his son, is on a razor's edge.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: As the oldest prison in California, San Quentin is steeped in a violent history, so it has a set of regulations and procedures to maintain order; inmates often operate under a different code of conduct; gangs control "prison politics.

programme.title: Lockup: San Quentin: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Boredom reigns supreme for prisoners who spend endless hours, days and months confined to their cells; some have devised creative ways to pass the time; one inmate is creating a wall mural, but not with real art supplies.

programme.title: Lockup: New Mexico: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A low-level offender increases his sentence from 18 months to 16-and-a-half years after three separate counts of aggravated battery on an officer; the same inmate was banned from even non-contact visits after an affair with a prison staff nurse.

programme.title: Lockup: New Mexico: Extended Stay
programme.desc: The Penitentiary of New Mexico houses both low level and max-security inmates; Level 6 inmates like Chris Shiverdecker, who has a Macgyver-like prison reputation, are still eligible for hearings that could change custody level and security status.

programme.title: Lockup: New Mexico: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Inmates who become disruptive at the Penitentiary of New Mexico are transferred to the lock-up units in level 5 or 6; the trouble is, their behavior doesn't always improve; this is a lesson rookie officer Amy lee is learning the hard way.

programme.title: Lockup: New Mexico: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Prison officials initiate a shakedown after gang members in Level 6 overpower an officer in the recreation area, take her keys and stab a rival gang member; this type of incident simply adds to the tension already felt in the supermax facility.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Iggy the Fool and Geb's N'doul, Part 1
programme.desc: Jotaro and his friends finally land in Egypt, where DIO awaits, and are cutting through the desert when a helicopter approaches. The helicopter belongs to the Speedwagon Foundation and is there to make a special delivery requested by Joseph.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Iggy the Fool and Geb's N'doul, Part 2
programme.desc: Jotaro and crew acquire the help of Iggy but are ambushed by a water Stand. With Kakyoin injured, Avdol tries out a stratagem which the unseen enemy quickly sees through. Meanwhile, Iggy is napping.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Khnum's Zenyatta and Thoth's Mondatta
programme.desc: After the battle with N'doul, Kakyoin and Avdol are badly hurt, so the group heads for a hospital in Aswan. Unfortunately, dangerous enemies could be all around them even there.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Anubis, Part 1
programme.desc: A young man named Chaka finds a mysterious sword on the beach. Though other men try, Chaka is the only one who can draw it. The sword claims Chaka as its master and sends the youth in pursuit of Jotaro and his friends with deadly intent.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Anubis, Part 2
programme.desc: Having defeated the "Anubis" Stand user Chaka, Polnareff pays a visit to a barber. But when the barber starts attacking him with Chaka's sword, the Frenchman realizes the sword itself is the Stand user.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bast's Mariah, Part 1
programme.desc: On the way to Luxor, Joseph notices an electrical outlet set in a rock. Fascinated by the rare sight, Joseph goes in for a closer look and gets shocked. Though he seems fine afterward, soon all manner of small accidents begin to occur around him.

programme.title: Ghost In The Shell
programme.desc: 2029 – A female government cyber agent and the Internal Bureau of Investigations are hot on the trail of a "The Puppet Master" – a computer virus capable of invading cybernetic brains and altering its victim’s memory.

programme.title: Ghost In The Shell
programme.desc: 2029 – A female government cyber agent and the Internal Bureau of Investigations are hot on the trail of a "The Puppet Master" – a computer virus capable of invading cybernetic brains and altering its victim’s memory.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: A poacher traps an endangered Iriomote cat on a remote island and boards a ferry. Onboard is Black Jack and Pinoko, along with a haughty politician. The wild cat escapes, causing a ruckus, and injuring the politician and a passenger's baby.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: Sharaku is a middle-schooler who is often bullied. One day, Pinoko saves him from Kong, a bully, and they become friends. Sharaku suddenly becomes gravely sick and Black Jack is called into the hospital to operate on him.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: At Tom, their favorite cafe, Black Jack and Pinoko encounter a boy with a physical disability who is intently reading a book by a handicapped person. Inspired by the memoir, he decides to walk 350km from Hiroshima to Osaka by himself.

programme.title: Black Jack
programme.desc: Pinoko and Sharaku are playing in a park when a stray dog grabs Pinoko's purse and runs off. They chase after the stray, but the dog is suddenly hit by a car outside of the park. Pinoko gets Black Jack to operate on the dog, and is successful.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon continues to hone his special ability by using the Enhancer, Emitter and Transmuter aura types.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Killua passes the Hunter Exam on his second attempt and returns to the game. Once reunited, Gon, Killua and Biscuit begin collecting cards steadily.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: In order to stop Genthru from clearing the game, Gon and Killua are asked to join an alliance.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and his friends meet the pirate boss Razor, but are overwhelmed by his power.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon and his friends team up with Hisoka and Goreinu to challenge Razor again. Also helping out is Team Tsezguerra.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon comes up with a plan to beat Razor, and it requires Killua's help.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon, Killua and Hisoka face Razor head on, and a winner will finally be crowned in this dodge ball showdown!

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Tsezguerra suggests that Gon and his friends should continue training while his team distracts Genthru.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and James Lewis wind through Devon, beginning in Exeter and traveling though Crediton and Torquay, headed for auction in Chudleigh.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On their last leg, Anita Manning and James Lewis begin in Dorchester, then travel to Portsmouth and Fareham before their final auction in London.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's the start of a new trip for Mark Stacey and Will Axon, traveling through East Sussex, from Hastings to an auction battle in Lewes.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's day two for Mark Stacey and Will Axon. Beginning in Bilsington, they travel across Kent before ending up at an auction in Sandwich.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Beginning in the coastal town of Deal in Kent, experts Mark Stacey and Will Axon head west to battle it out at their auction in Chiswick, London.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Will Axon and Mark Stacey begin in the Crystal Palace before heading to Piccadilly in central London to visit the home of The Kennel Club. The boys then head on to their auction in Southend-on-Sea.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Mark Stacey and Will Axon begin the final leg in Gosfield, Essex, through Finchingfield and St Albans, Hertfordshire, and end at auction in Ruislip.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's a brand-new trip for veteran Philip Serrell and new boy Tom Scott. They begin in St Buryan then wind their way up towards Wareham in Dorset.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Tom Scott start day two in Lostwithiel, then visit the ports of Plymouth and Morwellham quay before an auction in Cornwall.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Tom Scott start their day near Dartmoor at Ashburton. They'll be travelling around Devon before arriving at auction in Chudleigh.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Tom Scott begin at Exeter in the county of Devon, then travel through Dorchester before making for an auction at Upwey in Dorset.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Tom Scott start the day in Southampton, then head east through Fareham, Portsmouth and Southsea, to auction at Wareham in Dorset.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and David Harper begin in the town of Windermere, weaving through West Burton and Middleham to auction in East Boldon in Tyne and Wear.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Paul Laidlaw and David Harper start out in Sunderland before making their way through Durham to auction in the North Yorkshire town of Northallerton.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit the Valley Leisure Centre in Biddulph, Staffordshire. Featured are a rare Wedgwood egg scrambler, a Constable sketch, an English repeater watch, a remarkable collection of ship's documents, and Queen Victoria's handkerchief.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Glamis Castle in Angus, Scotland. They find a posy ring with a grim story, a dining table used for resting a coffin on, diamond jewelry, 18th-century miniatures with musical connections, and the scrapbook of a WW1 pilot.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael introduces sequences from previous roadshows and recounts stories of the Queen Mother's early life at Glamis Castle. Featuring ivory figures, a pair of Chinese imperial bowls, a stone necklace, and a collection of handbag mirrors.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Selby in North Yorkshire to examine an embroidered picture, a copy of Beatrix Potter's book The Fairy Caravan, two rare cornets, and a Masonic porcelain collection.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the experts visit Wisbech in Cambridgeshire where they examine a vase covered in paint and a Martinware bird. There's also an impressive collection of royal invitations, letters, sketches, and items from eminent Victorians.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael takes the experts to Blackpool to dig up a program for the 1936 cup tie between Blackpool and Bolton - including Stanley Matthews - a rare salt-glazed mug, and an unusual medal. And Michael discovers the predecessor of his big red book.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel takes the experts to Newport in Gwent to examine a teapot that holds 144 cups of tea, an 18th-century mourning ring, a rare Hungarian vase, a large painting of Britannia, and the 'nicest netsuke seen on the roadshow.'

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael Aspel and the experts gather for an al fresco day in the gardens of Knebworth House in Hertfordshire. Featured items include a diamond brooch, a marine chronometer, a bronze Spirit of Ecstasy.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: From Knebworth House in Hertfordshire, Michael introduces unseen finds from previous Roadshows and talks to Clive Farahar. Finds include a pair of female figures, an unusual table clock with a floating turtle, a chemist's mortar, and a Victorian toilet.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the experts visit Birmingham and find a Victorian painting, a telescope, an early 19th-century wooden ark, and a small pottery Turk's head, which turns out to be the most valuable piece of English pottery ever found at a Roadshow.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK
programme.desc: Michael and the experts are at Cliveden in Buckinghamshire to examine a valuable collection of jewelry found in a rubbish tip, a Stanley Spencer sketch of the owner's father, a brooch, and a silver beaker. Michael also makes a surprising discovery.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow UK

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep23

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep1
programme.desc: Conozca la historia de Catalina, una joven que cegada por su ambición y las malas influencias llegará a un paraíso al que jamás desearía haber entrado.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep2
programme.desc: Albeiro es seducido por el cuerpo de la madre de Catalina. Catalina es violada en el establo por los hombres de Mariño. Bairon rechaza a Jimena pues él se percata que ella se va diariamente como acompañante con los mafiosos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep3
programme.desc: Bairon es atacado, el hombre se oculta en la casa de su madre Hilda. Caballo busca a Catalina para matarla y que no se entere su patrón que él le quito la virginidad a la mujer. Albeiro le propone matrimonio a su novia. La Diabla habla con los capos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep4
programme.desc: La Diabla le consigue las modelos a Cardona y Morón. Albeiro le propone a Catalina irse a vivir juntos, ella lo rechaza. Catalina se entera de que está embarazada y aborta. Jessica lleva a su amiga a una fiesta de modelos realizada por mafiosos

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep5
programme.desc: Catalina se separa de Albeiro por un tiempo por lo último que le ha ocurrido. Cardona se acuesta con Catalina, la mujer le pide dinero al mafioso para la operación de sus senos. Caballo es asesinado. Cardona le pide a la niña que sea su amante

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep6
programme.desc: Cardona le da el dinero a Catalina, la mujer junto a la Diabla averiguan la cotización de la operación de su busto. Hilda se emborracha con Albeiro. Orlando es asesinado. Catalina se encuentra con su novio y su madre ebrios, se enfada.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep7
programme.desc: Catalina le declara su amor a Albeiro, sin embargo le aclara el no poder volver junto a él en estos momentos. Catalina se encuentra en un bar con Cardona y el Titi, Cardona le da dinero para que siga siendo su amante. Albeiro duerme con Hilda.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep8
programme.desc: Bairon asesina a una persona como sicario en su nueva profesión. Catalina se enfada con Cardona al enterarse de que el mafioso huyo del país por el allanamiento que hizo la policía. Jessica y Catalina viajan a Bogotá en busca de oportunidades laborales.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep9
programme.desc: Las amigas de la Diabla y Catalina empiezan a trabajar en un prostíbulo tras la mala situación económica que hay en el pueblo. Catalina tiene sexo con el Dr. Mauricio para que le ponga los implantes de seno. Albeiro e Hilda tienen una relación.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep10
programme.desc: Benjamín les exige sexo a las mujeres por la estadía, las chicas cachetean al hombre. Jessica y Catalina se refugian en una estación de policía, empeñan las joyas que le robaron al antiguo anfitrión. Mauricio evade a Catalina en la clínica.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep11
programme.desc: Hilda le declara su amor a Albeiro, los dos hacen el amor. Bairon se percata de lo sucedido y acepta el noviazgo de su madre con el supuesto novio de Catalina. La familia celebra el cumpleaños de Catalina.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep12
programme.desc: Catalina hace el amor con Albeiro después de embriagarlo para que no se note la pérdida de su virginidad. Catalina y Jessica se devuelven a Bogotá. El hombre oscuro contrata a Bairon para matar a un político.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep13
programme.desc: El hombre oscuro le da la misión a Bairon y a su compañero de eliminar al magistrado con un tiempo límite de un mes. Catalina seduce a Octavio. El hombre las echa de la casa. Las mujeres se encuentran con el doctor para la cirugía de los senos.

programme.title: Sin tetas no hay paraíso: S1 Ep14
programme.desc: A Catalina le realizan la operación, las mujeres son echadas del apartamento de Octavio pues él se ha enamorado de ella y se percata de una mentira por parte de ella. La mujer se ve con el Titi el cual se entusiasma por verla operada.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After suffering a stroke, the owner of Desi Romano's Sports Bar & Grill risks losing his family legacy if Jon can't help him bounce back.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A decade after a husband and wife left for corporate jobs, they repurchase the Speakeasy Bar & Grill and discover it isn't what it used to be.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Louisiana to rescue Big Mike's Sports Bar & Grill, a once-thriving bar and community staple that was cut down by devastating floods.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to the little town of Pahrump, Nevada, to help the owner of Paddy's Pub, who may soon lose his sense of sight forever.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon arrives in the nick of time to save Sidelines, a family-operated sports bar being run into the ground by a violent father.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon visits Rockin' Rhonda's Lounge, a bar literally on the brink of collapse after the insurance company refused to pay for damage caused by Hurricane Matthew.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon visits a Las Vegas dive to teach the owner of Jack's Place how to act less like a mother and more like a boss.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: If Jon is going to save the Liquid Lounge in Long Beach, CA, the first thing he has to do is eliminate the bar's serious ant problem.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A son takes over the failing family bar, and the biggest obstacle to getting out of the red is his abusive father, who spends all night sitting at the bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: When an old-school Memphis, TN, cigar shop owner opens an adjacent cocktail bar and hires his son as manager, the bar quickly becomes an afterthought.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The owner of Joe's Thirsty Lizard, a failing Mississippi dive bar, compounds his troubles by promoting a dishwasher with no experience to manager.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to middle-of-nowhere Tennessee to rescue The Wanted Saloon, whose remote location is just the first of many challenges.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A twerking, drinking, fighting staff threatens a once-thriving bar, leaving Ashley and Robert Gaddy's future at a crossroads.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon returns to Puerto Rico, where he used to live, to rescue a bar destroyed by Hurricane Maria and to help revive the rest of the community.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Matt Brody returns to Baywatch and ends up trapped on a yacht with Neely when a group of ruthless pirates takes hostages. Meanwhile, Joey's past may jeopardize her adoption by Mitch.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Logan and Caroline’s relationship hits a new low when Caroline returns his engagement ring, but things change when a baby is left in Logan’s possession. Meanwhile, Cody must overcome yet another setback to his Olympic career.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Caroline blames herself for a teen's death in a fiery nighttime boating accident and goes through Critical Incident Stress. Pushing everyone away, Caroline begins partying to distract from her guilt. Can the team help her recover from her PTSD?

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A mysterious, unseen creature begins attacking beachgoers, and it is up to the Baywatch team to find the creature. Meanwhile, Inside Sports Magazine wants a lifeguard for their swimsuit issue. Neely and Caroline compete for the cover.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Logan must help his friend Carmen raise $50,000 to keep her ranch, and Jessie Lee Harris is back in town just in time to help. Mitch finds himself in a deadly race for justice during his vacation in Baja, Mexico.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Stephanie, Caroline, and CJ become Charlie’s Angels in a fun fantasy romp through 70's television as they try and catch an escaped psychopath bent on killing lifeguards.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: CJ rescues pro wrestler Hulk Hogan, who then tells the Baywatch team that he's in town with Randy Savage to try and prevent the closure of the Venice Boys' Youth Center. Hogan must take on Ric Flair in a cage match to prevent the closure.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch is convinced by Stephanie's boyfriend Tom to go sky-surfing. Things go horribly wrong when Mitch's parachute fails to deploy! Back on the beach, CJ's lifeguarding duties are impeded when she begins dating a celebrity.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Stephanie is recruiting lifeguards for the annual Sailing Regatta where they will compete against South Bay, and Neely is taking the competition very seriously. Meanwhile, Mitch finds out Joey has grandparents who want to care for her.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch and Caroline rescue a woman who gets amnesia falling off the pier and must find her father to help her recover her memories. CJ meets a wheelchair-bound man who’s determined to get wheelchair access across the beach to the water.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The team is invited to Hawaii for a week to oversee new lifeguard techniques and relax a bit. Logan becomes obsessed with competing in a surfing competition. To avoid a curse, CJ and Stephanie must return a sacred lava rock to its original location.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Matt is stung by a poisonous fish, he and Mitch find a village where a young woman offers to help them, resulting in all three of them running from her jealous suitor. Logan’s selfish behavior puts his relationship with Caroline in jeopardy.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Kaye is reunited with old flame Wes Masters. Stephanie undergoes surgery for melanoma performed by her doctor and boyfriend Tom, who plans a romantic surprise for her when surgery is over. Caroline catches Logan cheating on her with Neely.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: While in search of underwater treasure, things take a deadly turn when Stephanie and Cody are confronted by a pair of drug smugglers. Back at headquarters, Newman faces off against a different type of treasure hunter…

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A married Texas police chief is arrested after his multiple affairs are exposed online. Jason Collier admits to cheating with not one, but several women, all while married to, & living with his wife. Collier comes clean about his web of lies. Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Brian, Liz, & Bethany. Now former friend Sarah says she lies as her "real" life is "not very exciting." Michelle, who is a cancer survivor and former friend of Sarah's, confronts Sarah for the first time. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Thirty-year-old mom of four, Melissa Dilan-Hernandez, made headlines when arrested and charged with having sex with her 17-year-old fiancé, T.J. The couple sits down with Dr. Phil to justify their relationship. Plus, does T.J.'s father approve?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: As children they were forced into a religious sect that sexually abused them & controlled their lives. Now, 30 years after an intense police raid shut down "The Zion Society", some of its victims gather for the first time to share stories of survival.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Brittany claims dad Charlie is scammed by his online fiancée "Stephanie" & her roommate "Carina." Charlie has given over $25K while "Stephanie" maintains a $4.5 million inheritance is coming. The investigation starts in Los Angeles and ends in Denmark!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: At age 45, Jeff moved back into his childhood bedroom in his mother's home & has reverted to a high schooler, for 16 years. Jeff's daughter, Tori, says her dad is a terrible father, an immature coward. Jeff comes face-to-face with his fed-up family.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In 2011, Ashlee's husband, Emmett, was having an affair with co-worker Kandi, when he was shot & killed by Kandi's husband, Rob. The story rocked their small Idaho town & left two families forever changed. Ashlee & Kandi come face- to-face on stage.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Rodney Reed was convicted in 1996 of the rape of murder of Stacey Stites, 19, and on death row, is just weeks away from execution, scheduled for November 20, 2019. Is there still time to stop his execution based on evidence and DNA?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Brittany who says dad Charlie is being scammed by his online fiancée "Stephanie" & her roommate "Carina." Charlie hopes to get married when they meet in person. The real women in the photos are on stage & Charlie goes face-to-face!

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Austin para investigar a las víctimas encontradas allí con sus relojes a la hora equivocada, una pista que puede conectar los delitos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran víctimas en Filadelfia en un estilo similar al de El replicador, el acosador que ha estado siguiendo cada movimiento de BAU, el equipo piensa que esta podría ser la oportunidad que necesitan para tratar de detenerlo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ayúdame a ayudarte
programme.desc: Linda pide a Danny y Báez que ayuden a su compañera de trabajo, quien está teniendo problemas con su exmarido enfurecido.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Amigos en necesidad
programme.desc: Jamie y Danny difieren en cómo manejar a un novato imprudente del NYPD, Marcus, hijo de un amigo de Danny. Mientras tanto, Erin investiga una mala inversión en la que se vio envuelto su investigador, Anthony, por culpa de su primo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Ciudad despiadada
programme.desc: Frank y Danny colaboran para ayudar a Nick Constantine, un exconvicto rehabilitado que Frank había encarcelado años atrás, cuando Constantine se ve implicado en el asesinato de un viejo enemigo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Consecuencias del pasado
programme.desc: Danny y Baez buscan a una banda de ladrones en una ola de crímenes, y se unen al detective Jimmy Mosley, quien años atrás rompió el corazón de Baez.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando el cadáver de un oficial estadounidense se relaciona con un buque de la Marina británica, el asesinato se convierte en un incidente internacional.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando un controvertido DJ y un oficial de la Marina son asesinados a tiros, el equipo descubre un siniestro plan.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Adentrándose en la mente de una brillante científica naval, Abby se obsesiona con resolver su asesinato, mientras que la última aventura de DiNozzo conduce a un interesante Halloween.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El padre de Dinozzo regresa, desempeñando un papel vital en la investigación de un asesinato que podría tener resultados catastróficos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran víctimas en Filadelfia en un estilo similar al de El replicador, el acosador que ha estado siguiendo cada movimiento de BAU, el equipo piensa que esta podría ser la oportunidad que necesitan para tratar de detenerlo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La BAU investiga a las víctimas que documentaban sus vidas personales y sus deseos internos en publicaciones de blogs y redes sociales. Además, Kevin se pone celoso cuando descubre que García puede tener un nuevo interés en el amor.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige al viejo barrio de Morgan en la ciudad de Chicago en busca de un sujeto cuyo objetivo son los hombres de mediana edad. Y una pista lleva a Morgan a creer que van tras alguien relacionado con el hombre que abusó de él cuando era niño.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando 25 años después se abre una cápsula del tiempo en un pequeño pueblo de Colorado y contiene una revelación espantosa, la UAC investiga ese crimen y un posible vínculo con la muerte de un oficial de policía local.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Eight hardcore athletes have come to the Broken Skull Challenge to go head to head in Rip Off, Ass Kicker and Grip & Rip. The winner goes on to face Steve's Skullbuster for a chance at $10,000.

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: Another eight tough as nails women come to the ranch with one goal in mind - making it to the Skullbuster. Will the one who succeeds walk away with $10,000?

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: It's the last men's episode of the season and Steve has brought in his toughest group yet. Will one of them have what it takes to beat the Skullbuster and take home $10,000?

programme.title: Steve Austin's Broken Skull Challenge
programme.desc: The last group of eight elite female athletes comes to the ranch in search of the title of Broken Skull Ranch Champion and $10,000.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: Steve Austin brings back 12 seasoned Redneck Island veterans and 12 eager new rookies to battle it out for $100,000. At the first challenge, the players dive into the competition as they fight it out to claim victory.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The game is turned on its head as one player quits the competition and another is seriously injured. The challenge turns physical as the teams fight to stay afloat.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The players must rise to the occasion as a daunting challenge pushes their limits to new heights. One of the veterans gets life-changing news from home. A powerful new alliance forms that changes the course of the game.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: A budding romance between two teammates complicates their future in the game. The challenge forces the competitors to put their brains as well as their brawn to the test.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The power continues to shift in the game, raising the stakes to a new high as the teams brawl it out at the challenge. Old romantic flames reignite between Margaret and Josh.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The rival alliances divide the house as a new power-team emerges. The players have a tough time choking down what Steve is serving up at the challenge. Two best friends face off against each other in an emotional Pit.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/02/2013. Bourdain and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, move from hip, modern Lima back in time into pre-Columbian Peru.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 06/09/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Congo, the setting of one of his favorite books, Conrad’s “Heart of Darkness.”

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 09/22/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Andalucia during Semana Santa, Holy Week, to visit longtime director Zach Zamboni, who currently lives in Granada.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 06/24/2018. Is Canada truly a tolerant racism-free multicultural utopia? A trip up north reveals some truths.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 07/01/2018. Hawaii isn’t just a paradise for tourists – its lands are full of history and culture. Experience its past, present and future from natives.

programme.title: United Shades of America
programme.desc: Aired 04/30/2017. Insight into an abundant cross-section of immigrants living in the Washington DC metro area who came to this country in search of a better life.

programme.title: Race for the White House
programme.desc: Aired 02/16/2020. Freshman Senator Barack Obama goes up against “maverick” Republican Senator John McCain.

programme.title: Race for the White House
programme.desc: Aired 02/23/2020. In the 1980 race, President Jimmy Carter and Republican Ronald Reagan fight off fierce challenges from within, as both parties struggle to re-invent themselves.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are called to a burglary at a warehouse housing expensive items. Police are called to the scene of a threatening man with a knife. Officers thwart an attempted suicide during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sizable amount of cocaine is seized during a routine search. An officer responds to a domestic dispute call, in which there are conflicting stories at the scene. An officer’s patrol car is nearly struck by a train, twice.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen car and its occupants roll into a canal and are fished out by Deputies. A shoplifting trio is caught with stolen goods. A trip to the mechanic ends in an arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man with a knife tries to evade police by hiding in bushes. Vice unit officers conduct a prostitution sting. When officers are shot at during a pursuit, the woman claims it was flashes from a camera.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Suspects lead officers on a reckless car chase on residential streets. Police tend to a woman assaulted by her inebriated friend. A DWI suspect is found relieving himself in a public port-a-potty.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are called when a mother's job hunt takes a turn for the worse, and deputies confront a nervous man with a lot of bad habits.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man pulls out all the stops to elude the police, a civilian steps in when she spots a violent crime in progress, and a suspected shoplifter is confronted by officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies work together to stay on the tail of a fleeing vehicle. An argumentative driver keeps his friends tuned in as he livestreams his own arrest. A mother’s desire to scare her daughter into behaving takes a serious turn.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A first-time offender brings officers on an intense car chase, deputies respond to an armed robbery, and a routine traffic stop ends in multiple arrests.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police catch up to a man with warrants and a history of resisting arrest, a fidgety driver arouses suspicion, and a minor with beers in his pants has to answer to his mom.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bewildered driver claims that he did not see the lights or hear the sirens when he was signaled to stop. Officers investigate a call regarding a suspicious parked car. A manager of an apartment complex is assaulted by their intoxicated tenants.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate driver attempts to flee on foot. Officers investigate a complaint in front of a local convenience store. Officers coordinate a sting designed to apprehend suspects who patronize prostitutes.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wild-eyed man leads police on a chase that ends in a Tasing, officers respond to an in-progress lovers' spat, and a traffic stop results in drug and auto theft charges.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist wanted by police hides out in his mom's garage, a man won't leave his ex-fiancee alone, and a pregnant woman gets busted for meth possession.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A high-speed pursuit switches gears when the driver flees on foot, an altercation causes tension between neighbors, and a driver is irate when officers search his passenger.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An Officer goes undercover as a prostitute. A woman finds a snake in her home. A man solicits himself to an undercover officer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man riding a bike at night with no lights decides to take off rather than talk with police, and a dangerous domestic dispute unfolds on the streets of Texas.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A deputy questions a driver about why his broken-down car looks like it’s been in an accident. Obstacle after obstacle prevents a woman from fixing her janky vehicle. A young man looking for a fresh start falls on hard times.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are called to a vehicle burglary in progress at an apartment complex. A traffic stop results in the discovery of drug paraphernalia. An officer locates a stolen van and discovers drug paraphernalia in the suspect’s purse.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A personalized keychain casts doubt on a man’s flimsy story. A cyclist throws something behind his back as soon as deputies roll up. A laid-back driver’s estimation of what’s in his car is off by a couple trash bags.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young driver sends a deputy on a high-speed chase, a woman's ride home from work turns into a nightmare, and officers find hard drugs in a troubled couple's car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man resisting arrest draws a crowd, an armed robbery suspect takes a walk down felony lane with an officer he recognizes, and a strange scene unfolds at a DUI checkpoint.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A desperate suspect flees from the cops after shots are fired, and a father and daughter are caught off-guard when they run into a man wielding a screwdriver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An open container and crack pipe are discovered inside a teen's vehicle. Officers find a man at a nearby residence lifting weights after trying to evade police. A fight involving two men and a shovel is broken up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A little rain doesn’t stop a determined quad driver from trying to outrun police. A deputy has doubts about a man’s professed distrust of banks. A man ignores obvious red flags when buying a moped and ends up paying the price.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a notorious New Jersey drug hotbed. Officers find a suspect hidden under a mattress. A bicycle thief is caught red handed.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers save a suspect's life after arresting him, a man assaults his wife after she uncovers his internet history, and a pregnant woman fears prosecuting her abuser.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine is called in by a pornographic-film developer to view graphic footage from a snuff movie in which a woman is brutally slain.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A cab driver seems to run over a boy and is then beaten to death by a mob for racial reasons.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Warrick, and Nick investigate the case of a man who apparently was murdered and pushed off a six-story building.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the grisly meat grinder murder at a slaughterhouse.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Some bird watchers find a raven with a human eyeball in its mouth. Warrick and Grissom look into the circumstances of David's unusual and first autopsy.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick investigates the drive by murder of a young girl in his old neighborhood.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine takes the point in the investigation of an escalating series of peeping tom incidents.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man driving with a wooden stake in his head dies in front of a casino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: An elderly woman crashes her car into a crowded restaurant. One of the patrons is Sara's paramedic boyfriend. Grissom and Nick investigate the possible carbon monoxide murder of a woman in her home.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine, Nick, and Sara investigate a seemingly months old body found in the mountains.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate a movie-goer who was stabbed to death.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the murder of a despised comic who died onstage, apparently after drinking from a tainted bottle of water.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The trampling death of a trainer by her horse aboard a private jet is investigated by Grissom, Catherine, and Nick. Sara and Warrick look into a Romeo and Juliet scenario in the desert.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara, and Nick investigate the murder of a woman in the press box of a high school stadium.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Los CSI investigan de primera mano los entresijos del Cirque du Soleil para determinar qué pudo contribuir a la prematura muerte de una joven bailarina.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom se siente fascinado cuando cada detalle de una miniatura es idéntico al de la escena de un crimen real, y se pone manos a la obra para intentar resolver el caso utilizando las pistas proporcionadas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre inocente es brutalmente atacado y golpeado hasta la muerte por lo que parece un monstruo con una capa negra, los CSI son llamados para investigar, sólo para enterarse de que un ataque similar tuvo lugar minutos después.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer muerta aparece colgada de una cruz en el interior de una iglesia, el equipo sigue las pruebas para descubrir un extraño triángulo amoroso que se remonta a los días de instituto de la víctima.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando se denuncia la desaparición de dos niños, el principal sospechoso es un conocido delincuente sexual del barrio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Mientras investiga el asesinato de una anciana, Grissom recibe una réplica en miniatura de la escena del crimen; Greg asiste a una vista para determinar su culpabilidad en la muerte accidental de un adolescente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando dos gemelas idénticas aparecen muertas, las pruebas en ambos casos no demuestran inmediatamente una conexión entre las dos muertes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan una serie de asesinatos en Las Vegas que podrían estar relacionados con un infame jefe de la mafia de los años 70 que desapareció hace muchos años.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando los CSI procesan pistas tras un asesinato en una planta de fabricación de aves de corral, las pruebas les conducen a la casa de un hombre que colecciona trenes en miniatura y otra parafernalia en miniatura.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El testimonio de Catherine ante el tribunal no es suficiente para condenar a un asesino sospechoso de asesinar a su propia madre.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El principal sospechoso del sonado asesinato del asambleísta Danilo Zamesca es Thomas Simon, el mayor proveedor de drogas de la costa oeste.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando Catherine y Keppler comienzan a investigar el asesinato de una desconocida adolescente, ambos coinciden en que el asesino, que fue meticuloso a la hora de eliminar pruebas del cadáver y sus alrededores, es probablemente reincidente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un caso relacionado con el cadáver calcinado de un hombre cuyos huesos y tejidos habían sido extraídos lleva a Nick y Keppler al inquietante mundo de la venta ilegal de partes de cuerpos humanos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom regresa de su año sabático como profesor mientras el nuevo miembro del equipo Michael Keppler intenta desesperadamente mantener su oscuro pasado oculto a sus colegas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: It was supposed to be a routine undercover trip to the incinerator to dispose of drug evidence, but the police officers are ambushed.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio's case of a murdered woman is compromised when the federal agents, who have their own agenda to follow, get involved.

programme.desc: Estrellas y rivales juntos en una hilarante comedia musical. Grandes voces se unen en un espectáculo benéfico donde ocurrirán muchos disparates.

programme.title: Mujeres Encantadoras
programme.desc: Un grupo de mujeres sospechan que sus parejas son infieles y arman un enredo a los pobres mujeriegos involucrados.

programme.title: El Quijote
programme.desc: Rocinante tiene un romance del que sale golpeado, al igual que su dueño. Don Quijote y Sancho llegan a una venta donde son nuevamente golpeados y Sancho queda mantado por que Don Quijote no quiere pagarle al ventero.

programme.title: Muñecas Peligrosas
programme.desc: Cuatro valientes y aguerridas mujeres pelean contra una pandilla de criminales que quiere apoderarse de una valiosa fórmula de un científico.

programme.title: La flecha envenenada (LAS)
programme.desc: Una joven huérfana es atacada por apaches y debe pagar las deudas de su padre, ya que puede ser despojada de sus tierras.

programme.title: The Curious Case Of Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.title: Garras
programme.desc: Michael Douglas y Val Kilmer protagonizan esta gran aventura ambientada en el África Oriental de 1896. Dos leones asesinos interrumpen la construcción del ferrocarril. Cazan juntos, sin mostrar temor por el hombre o las armas de fuego.

programme.title: Chaplin
programme.desc: Chaplin es un encantador retrato a gran escala de la vida y época del vagabundo. Su infancia marcada por la pobreza en Inglaterra cobra vida, junto con su amistades, sus esposas y romances escandalosos, y la implacable persecución de J. Edgar Hoover.

programme.title: Leyendas de vida
programme.desc: La leyenda de Bagger Vance cuenta la historia de Rannulph Junuh. Su encuentro con Bagger Vance, que se convierte en algo más que un entrenador, llegando a ser un verdadero life coach, es clave para recuperar la confianza en sus capacidades.

programme.title: Tierra Salvaje
programme.desc: Cuando una derrota en el ring deja a Lion y a su hermano y mánager, Stan, en deuda con un jefe criminal, todos se ven obligados arriesgarlo todo en un torneo de boxeo a puño limpio mientras luchan por una vida mejor.

programme.title: The Curious Case Of Benjamin Button
programme.desc: Brad Pitt y Cate Blanchett protagonizan esta adaptación de la historia de F. Scott Fitzgerald acerca de un anciano que va rejuveneciendo y los problemas que surgen cuando se enamora de una mujer.

programme.title: Pasión por el triunfo
programme.desc: Doug es un jugador de hockey sobre hielo, pero sus sueños se truncan por un accidente que da fin a su carrera. Kate es una patinadora artística, quien elitista la fuerza a patinar sola. Juntos, el improbable dúo va por el oro olímpico.

programme.title: Pasión por el triunfo 2: medalla olímpica
programme.desc: Dos patinadores de hielo (Christy Carlson Romano, Ross Thomas) entablan una relación de amor y odio mientras sueñan con alcanzar la gloria.

programme.title: Pasión por el triunfo 3: Persiguiendo un sueño
programme.desc: Un patinador de hielo y su nueva pareja se sienten atraídos mutuamente mientras entrenan para competir en París.

programme.title: A Walk On The Moon
programme.desc: En el verano de 1969, Pearl (Diane Lane) conoce a un extraño sensual y de espíritu libre (Viggo Mortensen), durante unas tediosas vacaciones familiares más con su esposo. Así que hará lo impensable: tener un intrépido y apasionado amorío.

programme.title: I.Q: fórmula para amar
programme.desc: Todo el mundo sabe que Einstein es un genio científico. Pero ¿qué hay de Einstein el casamentero? I.Q. pone esta noción a prueba y logra resultados ganadores en esta "divertida y cálida comedia romántica" que aplauden críticos y público.

programme.title: Verano en Louisiana
programme.desc: La historia de una joven que llega a la mayoría de edad y se enamora de su vecino.

programme.title: Corazones en conflicto
programme.desc: Joon es una joven que padece de una afección mental y Benny, su hermano mayor, se ha pasado la vida cuidándola. Sus vidas cambiarán para siempre cuando un inadaptado caprichoso llamado Sam se abre camino en sus corazones.

programme.title: Escape de Los Ángeles
programme.desc: El hombre del parche regresó. Llámenlo Serpiente. Su tarea es recorrer Los Ángeles destruido para recuperar un dispositivo letal.

programme.title: El vengador del futuro
programme.desc: Es el año 2084 D.C.y a Doug Quaid lo persiguen sueños recurrentes de un viaje a Marte, el planeta vecino más cercano a la Tierra. Vive en una época que ha sobrevivido otra guerra mundial y donde las elecciones para el gobierno ya no existen.

programme.title: Instinto predador
programme.desc: Un cazador (Nicolas Cage) debe luchar por su vida en un barco cuando sus mortíferos animales -entre ellos un raro jaguar blanco- son soltados por un peligroso criminal que quiere matar a todos a bordo.

programme.title: El Robo más Grande de la Historia
programme.desc: Basada en una historia real, Dwayne Johnson interpreta a un detective de la policía de Nueva York que intenta resolver el mayor robo de dinero de la historia de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Doble impacto
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme hace el papel de los gemelos, Chad y Alex Wagner, hermanos separados tras el brutal asesinato de sus padres. Veinticinco años después, el destino los reúne para vengarse y causar un dolor doble.

programme.title: Contacto sangriento
programme.desc: El maestro de Ninjutsu Frank Dux viaja a Hong Kong para participar en el Kumite, las olimpiadas de artes marciales, y conoce a una hermosa periodista estadounidense. Al poco tiempo deberá enfrentarse a Chong-Li, un despiadado maestro coreano de taekwondo.

programme.title: Juego letal
programme.desc: Ambientado en un mundo futuro donde los humanos pueden controlar a otros humanos en juegos en línea, un jugador estrella (Butler) de un juego llamado "Slayers" busca recuperar su independencia mientras acaba con la mente maestra del juego (Hall ).

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: Secuestro Express
programme.desc: Carla y Martín son una pareja secuestrada por tres hombres que pasan una noche aterradora en Caracas mientras esperan que el padre de Carla pague el rescate.

programme.title: Compadres
programme.desc: Un policía mexicano y un joven americano hacker de computadores, unen fuerzas para entregar un criminal a la justicia en esta comedia de acción llena de altas emociones y risas escandalosas.

programme.title: El Cuerpo
programme.desc: Un detective busca el cuerpo de una mujer fatal después de que desaparece de la morgue.

programme.title: Gloria
programme.desc: Una despreocupada mujer mayor descubre algo inesperado después de una breve aventura con un oficial naval retirado que conoció en un club nocturno.

programme.title: Después de Lucía
programme.desc: Alejandra es una joven de 17 años que se acaba de mudar a la ciudad de México con su padre. Ella se convierte en el blanco de sus compañeros cuando comienza a circular un video de ella teniendo relaciones sexuales.

programme.title: El camino correcto
programme.desc: Arturo, un joven de la ciudad de El Verde Bonao en la República Dominicana rural, aprovecha las posibilidades que se le presentan al ir a la ciudad con la esperanza de ayudar a su madre, que acaba de ser diagnosticada con leucemia.

programme.title: Del crepúsculo al amanecer
programme.desc: En este clásico de Tarantino, los bandidos hermanos Gecko ¡cometen una ola de crímenes! Secuestran a un padre y sus dos hijos, y se esconden en un bar mexicano. Pero se enfrentarán a los clientes del bar y se unirán a sus rehenes para sobrevivir.

programme.title: Del crepúsculo al amanecer 2: Texas sangriento
programme.desc: Cuando una pandilla de ladrones de bancos escapa hacia la frontera, terminan en el bar equivocado y se meten con los vampiros equivocados. ¡Será una batalla de matar o morir para frenar a estas criaturas malignas y sobrevivir!

programme.title: Del crepúsculo al amanecer 3: la hija del verdugo
programme.desc: Al caer la noche, el escritor Ambrose Bierce y otros compañeros de viaje se reúnen en un bar en el desierto de México, en 1914. Será una experiencia difícil de olvidar, ya que el bar está dirigido por un grupo de seres sedientos de sangre.

programme.title: Del crepúsculo al amanecer
programme.desc: En este clásico de Tarantino, los bandidos hermanos Gecko ¡cometen una ola de crímenes! Secuestran a un padre y sus dos hijos, y se esconden en un bar mexicano. Pero se enfrentarán a los clientes del bar y se unirán a sus rehenes para sobrevivir.

programme.title: Del crepúsculo al amanecer 3: la hija del verdugo
programme.desc: Al caer la noche, el escritor Ambrose Bierce y otros compañeros de viaje se reúnen en un bar en el desierto de México, en 1914. Será una experiencia difícil de olvidar, ya que el bar está dirigido por un grupo de seres sedientos de sangre.

programme.title: El aro 2
programme.desc: Cuando la evidencia en la escena del crimen local revela un misterioso y anónimo video, Rachel se da cuenta que Samara ha vuelto y está más decidida que nunca a continuar su despiadado ciclo del terror.

programme.title: Viaje censurado
programme.desc: Cuatro amigos emprenden un viaje de 3000 kilómetros para recuperar un video ilícito enviado por error a una amiga.

programme.title: Norbit
programme.desc: Murphy protagoniza a un Norbit apacible, que recibe una segunda oportunidad con el amor de su infancia, Kate. Sin embargo, los obstáculos podrían complicar este romance más de lo esperado.

programme.title: Duro de vender (el que no enseña no vende)
programme.desc: El lisonjero vendedor Don Ready (Jeremy Piven) y su alocado equipo de cerradores tienen un fin de semana para vender más de 200 autos y demostrar que cuando se trata de estafar, conspirar y de usar todo tipo de artimañas, ¡ellos tienen lo necesario!

programme.title: Los tres amigos
programme.desc: Las locuras de tres actores hollywoodenses (Steve Martin, Chevy Chase y Martin Short) que enfrentan a un grupo de bandidos mexicanos. ¿Qué podría salir mal?

programme.title: Viaje censurado
programme.desc: Cuatro amigos emprenden un viaje de 3000 kilómetros para recuperar un video ilícito enviado por error a una amiga.

programme.title: La familia Perez
programme.desc: En el 1980, un dueño de una hacienda cubana es finalmente liberado tras pasar 20 años en la cárcel. Anhelando con ver a su esposa e hija, a él le permiten entrar al barco migratorio que va para Florida.

programme.title: Evolución
programme.desc: Un recluta de bombero, dos profesores universitarios, y la geek científica enviada por el gobierno, luchan contra un organismo alienígena que ha evolucionado rápidamente desde que llegó a la tierra dentro de un meteorito.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: The cattle rancher McLintock (John Wayne) puts his brand on the territory and every woman in it! Louise Warren plays a widow who moves with her two children onto McLintock’s ranch to serve as cook, while Maureen O’Hara plays the estranged wife.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (1960)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner stars as one of seven gunslingers pitted against an army of marauding bandits in this rousing classic that made stars of Steve McQueen, Charles Bronson, and James Coburn. Eli Wallach also stars in this timeless tale of good versus evil.

programme.title: Guns of The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: In this thrilling follow-up to one of the greatest Western sagas in film history, notorious desperado Chris Adams (George Kennedy) is offered a huge reward to free a young Mexican revolutionary from prison…in the midst of the Mexican Revolution.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven Ride!
programme.desc: When his wife is killed, Marshal Chris Adams (Lee Van Cleef) discovers that a ruthless horde of marauders has killed all the men -- and will come back for the women -- in a nearby border town...unless The Magnificent Seven can stop them!

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: A retired gunfighter, now a drifter determined to establish a peaceful life, comes to the aid of a homestead family threatened by a land baron and his hired gun.

programme.title: Breakheart Pass
programme.desc: As a train races through the Rocky Mountains, the passengers are being murdered! The only hope is John Deakin (Charles Bronson) who uncovers a secret that explodes in a torrent of shocking revelations, explosive brawls, and blazing gun battles.

programme.title: Invitation to a Gunfighter
programme.desc: Screen legend Yul Brynner turns in a magnificent performance as a gunfighter who must do battle with his most formidable adversary - his own conscience - in this gripping, double-barreled western full of surprise twists and colorful villainy.

programme.title: Houseboat
programme.desc: This Oscar®-nominated film has the legendary Cary Grant as a government attorney who can't seem to shake his bad fortune. Living on a houseboat, widowed and left with three unruly kids, he hires Sophia Loren as a governess.

programme.title: That Touch of Mink
programme.desc: Love arrives with a splash when a handsome and eligible tycoon and a beautiful working woman meet over a curbside mud puddle. He’s enchanted by her small town ways, she’s captivated by his romantic, debonair manner.

programme.title: It's A Mad, Mad, Mad, Mad World
programme.desc: Spencer Tracy leads a hilariously zany cast of Hollywood's greatest comedians (including Milton Berle, Sid Caesar, Ethel Merman and Mickey Rooney) as eight vacation-bound motorists set off on a mad-cap, side-splitting race to find a stolen fortune!

programme.title: Paradise, Hawaiian Style
programme.desc: Elvis takes to the skies over the island paradise of Kauai. He’s a partner in a helicopter charter service. Romance, naturally, is in the air for the King…but his business may be grounded.

programme.title: Houseboat
programme.desc: This Oscar®-nominated film has the legendary Cary Grant as a government attorney who can't seem to shake his bad fortune. Living on a houseboat, widowed and left with three unruly kids, he hires Sophia Loren as a governess.

programme.title: That Touch of Mink
programme.desc: Love arrives with a splash when a handsome and eligible tycoon and a beautiful working woman meet over a curbside mud puddle. He’s enchanted by her small town ways, she’s captivated by his romantic, debonair manner.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Carter sends Gomer to a psychiatrist when he claims he has seen men from outer space.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer is arrested after wrecking Sgt. Carter's car.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan must reverse course when efforts to make Klink look competent before the Nazi Inspector General get the Kommandant promoted with a transfer to Berlin.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan's efforts to help a German baroness to escape are thwarted by Klink, who has arranged for the transfer of a British prisoner who is senior to Colonel Hogan.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: When a British commando unit is captured before they can blow up a crucial German ammo dump, Hogan and his men attempt to finish the job.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: In order to steal enough explosives to blow up a difficult bridge, Hogan's men paint anti-Nazi graffiti on the camp's ammo building.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan wants to get a peek at the documents that a visiting general has.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan convinces Kommandant Klink that the heavy water being stored at Stalag 13 is a youth potion.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: After Klink finds Sergeant Schultz drunk he gets a tough new replacement.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Haney is up to his money-making schemes again. When a government representative tells Mr. Haney that the state is looking to purchase the Douglas farm for a new highway, Mr. Haney arranges to buy back the farm from the Douglases at a steal.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Ralph, the lady carpenter, runs away from home and stays with the Douglases after having a fight with her brother, Alf. While Oliver may never get his bedroom finished, he gains a maid as Ralph takes over as the Douglases' live-in housekeeper.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Picking apples while on a picnic, Oliver runs into the feisty Ira Hatch, the owner of the apple orchard. However, once back in town, Mr. Drucker tells Oliver that Hatch has been dead for years. An incredulous Oliver agrees to see a psychologist.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After his elopement and cross-country honeymoon, Eb returns to Hooterville. But his new wife is nowhere to be found! After sending postcards from all across the country, Eb has to confess that his fiancé stood him up at the alter on their big day.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Someone has stolen $300 from Mr. Drucker's general store, and it looks like Eb is the culprit. How else could he have bought himself a new car that cost, you guessed it, exactly $300? But that is just the first twist of the many turns of this story.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa's dreams come true, and so do Oliver's nightmares, when Eb discovers a runaway boy sleeping in the hay in their barn. Lisa is only too excited about the idea of having the sounds of platters of little feet around the house.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob leaves the show after Mel rejects his script and is upset when Buddy and Sally don't join him.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob and Laura watch a scary movie only to find certain details of that movie coming true the following day.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Laura tries to break Rob of his expensive habit of picking up the check.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: To his regret, Rob ignores Laura's warning to be careful on the slopes during his first skiing excursion.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: The Petries hire a painter who ends up painting much more than just their living room.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob, Laura, and the office gang put together a variety show to help out an old friend.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob plans to make himself scarce when he hears French heartthrob and old acquaintance, Jacques Savon, is Alan's guest star.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob finds himself very out of place at a dinner party for celebrated literati.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Felix plans a surprise birthday party for Oscar -who loathes birthday parties.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Oscar tells Myrna the story of why Felix has been banned from Midtown Memorial Hospital ever since his daughter's birth in The First Baby.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: Allen invites Oscar to be a celebrity contestant on his ABC show, and eager Felix persuades him to accept the offer and to take him along as his partner.

programme.title: The Odd Couple
programme.desc: To understand each other better, Felix and Oscar reverse their roles -- Felix turning to a slob and Oscar becoming a fussbudget.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: While singing at her boyfriend Troy’s nightclub, LuAnn Corbin discovers that he is being forced by a shady drug dealer from his past, Brent Shaw, to use the club as a cover to sell Ecstasy. LuAnn is torn between love and her duty as an officer.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Former Chief Detective Virgil Tibbs returns to Sparta and is instantly assigned his first case as a lawyer, representing an accused murderer, Delbert Pike. Pike claims it was self-defense, but the victim’s wife was a witness and says it was murder.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: After his nephew Matt almost dies from a drug overdose, Bubba Skinner travels to Atlanta, Georgia to help him overcome his addiction to heroin. While investigating Matt’s drug supplier, he teams up with an undercover detective, Walker Harris.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Sergeant LuAnn Corbin takes temporary custody of an abandoned baby boy found at a crack house after a drive-by shooting is reported in the Bottoms. When the infant’s young mother, a crack addict, comes to reclaim the boy, LuAnn struggles to let go.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes Sparta when a young alcoholic woman, Holly Maynard, kills a child, Denia Larson, in a hit-and-run accident; however, a second and unexpected tragedy sadly follows, which will expose certain tragic failures of the justice system.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A meticulous and ruthless assassin and former government agent is hired by a rightwing cabal to murder a visiting Chinese diplomat.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Keller infiltrates a group of Vietnam War protesters, hoping to find who murdered an AWOL marine.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: An innocent man isn't worried about a new murder charge against him, but he is afraid that once the police process his fingerprints, they will learn that he is a fugitive from a 25-year-old homicide investigation.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: When five terrorists whose plan to pass through a security checkpoint at a boating dock fails, they flee taking on several hostages including Inspector Steve Keller.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A troubled teen from a broken home is suspected of shooting a friend's stepfather.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A killer ends up working with a witness to their crime.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Lieutenant Michael Stone and Inspector Steven Keller investigate the murder of women. The murderer was wearing an officer's uniform of the United States Air Force.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Mike's former partner returns to San Francisco, but not because of any longing for the good old days. He is back in town to kill the hired gunman who murdered his son years before.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: While investigating the whereabouts of millions of embezzled money, Barnaby uncovers fraud, blackmail, and a couple of murders committed by a man who is supposed to be dead.

programme.title: Kung Fu
programme.desc: Native Americans, desert killers and a Barbary Coast overlord menace Caine (DAVID CARRADINE) as he continues to search for his brother. Second part of a four-part episode. Leslie Nielsen guest stars.

programme.title: Kung Fu
programme.desc: Kwai Chang Caine's (DAVID CARRADINE) long search for Danny Caine (TIM McINTIRE) comes to an end in a deserted mine where his brother is waiting to kill him! Third part of a four-part episode. Leslie Nielsen and Carl Weathers guest star.

programme.title: Kung Fu
programme.desc: Brothers Kwai Chang (DAVID CARRADINE) and Danny Caine (TIM McINTIRE) stand shoulder to shoulder in a fight for their lives as they try to reunite their family. Fourth part of a four-part episode. Leslie Nielsen guest stars.

programme.title: Kung Fu
programme.desc: Kwai Chang Caine (DAVID CARRADINE) enlists the aid of the Prince of Thieves to restore a Chinese Duke to his royal throne.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: In order to unify the nations of Earth, a group of scientists sets out to secretly create the ultimate, global threat -- an all-powerful alien monster -- via human mutation! Robert Culp stars as the scientist chosen to undergo the transformation.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: A meek, unassuming college professor (Donald Pleasence) invents a device capable of controlling the entire electromagnetic spectrum and realizes the device has unleashed his subconscious thirst for revenge—with uncontrollable and deadly results!

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: A brilliant scientist (Edward Mulhare) discovers a way to accelerate human evolution and transforms a bitter young coal miner (David McCallum) into the man of the future. But no gift is exactly what it seems…especially in the Outer Limits.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1963
programme.desc: Martin Landau stars as the time-traveler Andro who is desperately trying to stop the birth of a crazed 20th-century inventor whose bacterium invention turns humans into hideous mutants. Shirley Knight co-stars in this classic, touching episode.

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Tony doesn’t know whether he should believe Carolyn or Julia. Barnabas attempts to strangle Julia.

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Sarah informs David that the dead will shortly destroy someone living at Collinwood.

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: A seance is held at Collinwood to contact the spirit of Sarah. Victoria disappears.

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Victoria finds herself outside the Old House. She has traveled back in time to the year 1795.

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: In 1795, Barnabas’ father Joshua Collins agrees to hire Victoria as the governess for Sarah.

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: The ship carrying Barnabas’ fiancee, Josette DuPres, is late. Josette’s servant, Angelique, arrives.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and Pete Thornton travel to Southeast Asia to rescue a group of orphans, a nun, and Mac's old flame, Debra Easton, whose lives are threatened by an oppressive regime.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and a deaf school teacher, Carrie Linden, live out a nightmare when they stumble upon an ex-CIA agent's ingenious plan to steal a missile, piece by piece, and sell it on the black market.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver battles the mob while protecting an elderly couple who have unwittingly become mixed up in a syndicate counterfeiting operation.

programme.title: The Best of the Carol Burnett Show
programme.desc: For a guest like Tim Conway, Carol's door is always open!

programme.title: Johnny Carson
programme.desc: TV star Michael Landon gets sentimental over Bonanza; watching episodes dubbed in Japanese and promoting the show at county fairs. Actress Bo Derek talks about vine-swinging for Tarzan, the Ape Man.

programme.title: The Johnny Carson Show: Hollywood Icons Of The '70s
programme.desc: Comic actress Teri Garr creates a stir on Johnny’s set in her see-through blouse. Shows a clip from her Oscar-nom’d performance in Tootsie, and parses success in show biz vs. recognition as an actress.

programme.title: Johnny Carson
programme.desc: John Candy stops by with screen icon Maureen O'Hara. Plus, Jim Valvano appears and Johnny gives up smoking in the monologue.

programme.title: Johnny Carson
programme.desc: Finally, the world has proof that Johnny's desk backdrop isn't real when Mel Brooks reveals all in this episode. Also: Teri Garr insists that money is not important to her.

programme.title: Johnny Carson
programme.desc: Jokes are the theme on this show, with Martin Short, Terri Garr, and Michael Keaton. Lotsa fun!

programme.desc: En 1989, April Loveless, de 4 años, fue encontrada muerta en el patio trasero de su casa en Texas. Sus padres le dijeron a la policía que fue atacada y asesinada por perros salvajes. Los investigadores no estuvieron de acuerdo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.desc: Cuando la policía recuperó el automóvil sumergido de un hombre al que se denunció su desaparición, esperaban encontrar su cuerpo, pero no estaba allí.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fantasma en la máquina

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El conductor dijo que no podía haber sido él quien atropelló a un peatón y se fugó en la calle Harrisburg. El Jeep Grand Cherokee que él estaba arrendando en ese entonces había sido vendido meses atrás a otro comprador en otro estado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un cirujano es apuñalado hasta la muerte y el sospechoso más probable es visto en un restaurante al momento del asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, la policía de San Diego está desconcertada por un par de manos encontradas en un contenedor de basura. A través de una investigación adicional, determinan que las manos son las de la persona desaparecida Don Hardin.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las vida cambia después de 20 años de haber transcurrido un crimen sin resolver, y lo mismo ocurre con la medicina forense. Hoy en día, un microscopio de alto poder y el perfil de ADN, revelan una pista que nadie había visto antes.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un policía retirado es descubierto en su cama, muerto de una sola herida de bala en la cabeza. Su esposa primero dice que el motivo fue un robo; luego le dice a la policía que se suicidó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A cenar y ver una película

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has a big problem. Patty Estabilio has jumped a $15,000 bail bond and disappeared into Hawaii's underworld. Kissing the kids good night, Dog and Beth, with Tim and Leland at their side, plunge into a drug-infused netherworld.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Justin is the low man on the totem pole in the Chapman clan, and this means that the rest of the team is always teasing him. But Justin wants to be a full-fledged member of the team, and Dog has a fugitive that will be his test case.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team return to their roots, with a visit to their home town of Denver. Dog and Tim begin the day with an early morning radio show appearance, and it pays off when a listener calls in with a tip about one of the fugitives they're hunting.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Denver Dog discovers that recapturing the past can be more difficult then tracking down felons. On a day of more misses then hits in their fugitive hunting, Dog and Beth repeatedly collide with reminders of their early days.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog hunts down Chris, a fugitive wanted on drug charges. Dog turns over every rock, but to no avail. Later, they decides to revoke the bonds they holds on Chris's mother and stepfather because they've violated the conditions of their own bonds.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after Virginia, a hard-to-find lawbreaker. He gets a tip that a pickup truck will be going to Virginia's house. In true private-eye fashion, the team tails the truck in two SUVs, regularly switching the follow car to throw off their scent.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to sweep the island clean of as many fugitives as he can in two days. Raymond, wanted on drug charges, is an easy grab. Mauro, wanted for solicitation, is busted. And a Samoan, Siamau, is convinced to fly back to Hawaii from L.A.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after a fugitive named Tracy who lives in a homeless shelter, but the shelter's staff is uncooperative, and the two sides get into an angry confrontation that forces Dog to temporarily back off.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Upset because one his puppies may die and wanting to give the little guy a second chance in life, Dog decides to offer one of the fugitives a second chance, too. He captures Paul, a meth addict, then steers him to a rehab program instead of jail.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team are out to revoke bail on Eugene, a chronic heroin addict. They find him in a squalid apartment with a huge stockpile of syringes, and they can see that his physical condition is deteriorating.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team fight the war on ice-crystal methamphetamine-on many fronts. They appear on a special anti-drug float in a parade. Then they go after bail-jumping Pana, a convicted drug dealer.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter
